title: ctenopteris jenmanii
intro: Ctenopteris jenmanii, also known as the New Zealand fern or maidenhair fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ctenopteris jenmanii include reducing inflammation, improving lung function, and acting as an antispasmodic to alleviate coughs and congestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be dried or used fresh in various remedies.
